backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (attendance, expenses, reminders, chat, calendar, etc.) and including storage/authorization mixins with migration support for the Crystal Atlas backend.
backend/migration.mo: Motoko migration module that defines OldActor and NewActor types (both with userProfiles map) and a no-op run function passing old state through unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the user profile hooks and ProfileEditorDialog frontend feature to its relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file for build planning and documentation purposes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Crystal Atlas React app with Crystal Atlas branding, favicon, and a reference to the packaging guide.
frontend/PACKAGING.md: Guide explaining how to create a distributable release ZIP of Crystal Atlas including prerequisites, included contents, and packaging instructions.
frontend/release/.gitkeep: Empty placeholder file to keep the release output directory tracked in Git.
frontend/scripts/package-release.mjs: Node.js script that builds the frontend, then creates a deterministic ZIP archive of source and built assets using archiver, filtered by the release manifest.
frontend/scripts/release-manifest.mjs: Defines include/exclude glob patterns for the release package and exports a shouldIncludeFile helper that tests file paths against those patterns.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up QueryClient, authentication state, tab definitions, and renders the appropriate page component based on the active tab with admin-gated routes.
frontend/src/components/attendance/Atten: A form component for editing a single day's attendance entry, allowing users to set status, check-in/check-out times, and notes, with validation and permission checks.
A monthly calendar grid component that displays attendance entries and holidays with color-coded day cells, supporting date selection and month navigation.
A UI section that lets users select a time range (week/month/year) and export their attendance summary as a PDF file.
frontend/src/components/attendance/Holid: An admin-only card component for viewing, adding, and deleting holidays for the current month, with type selection (festival or company leave).
frontend/src/components/auth/ApprovalGat: A gate component that restricts child content to approved or admin users, showing a pending-approval UI with an access request button for unapproved users.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/UserProfile: A modal dialog component that forces new users to set up their profile by entering a display name and optionally uploading a profile photo before proceeding.
frontend/src/components/broadcast/AdminB: A card component that allows admins to compose and send broadcast messages (up to 500 characters) to all users.
frontend/src/components/broadcast/Broadc: A card component that displays a scrollable, reverse-chronological list of past broadcast messages.
A modal dialog that displays an incoming admin broadcast message to the user and requires them to explicitly dismiss it.
frontend/src/components/character/Armore: A React Three Fiber canvas component that renders the 3D character with WebGL detection, error boundaries, and fallback UI if rendering fails.
frontend/src/components/character/Charac: A dock component that renders the 3D character canvas and selects the appropriate animation based on the active tab or reminder state.
A fallback UI component displayed when the 3D character model fails to load, showing an error message and optional error details.
frontend/src/components/character/TripoC: A procedurally animated 3D character built from basic Three.js geometries (capsule body, sphere head, arms) with different animation behaviors driven by the active animation type.
frontend/src/components/customers/Custom: A dialog form component for creating or editing a customer record with fields for name, email, phone, address, company, and work details.
A dialog component that allows users to import customers from Excel or PDF files, parsing column headers with normalization and dynamically loading SheetJS/PDF.js libraries from CDN.
frontend/src/components/deskboard/Assist: A Three.js-based 3D assistant widget card with holographic glow and pulse animations that displays counts for todos, reminders, and notes, plus a search button via an HTML overlay.
frontend/src/components/deskboard/ClockC: A React widget that displays a live digital clock (updating every second) and a monthly calendar grid with the current day highlighted.
frontend/src/components/deskboard/Deskbo: Sets up a React Three Fiber Canvas with WebGL detection, an error boundary, and renders the 3D background and assistant widget inside a Suspense wrapper.
Renders animated 3D background elements including floating particles, rotating geometric torus rings, and a pulsing wireframe grid plane.
frontend/src/components/errors/AppErrorB: A React class-based error boundary that catches render errors, unhandled promise rejections, and window errors, displaying a recovery UI with reset and reload options.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppHeader: Renders the top app header with logo, login button, attendance navigation, and Excel workbook replace/reset controls including file upload handling and validation.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main layout wrapper that composes the header, desktop sidebar nav, main content area with optional CharacterDock, footer, and in-app reminder notifier.
frontend/src/components/layout/DesktopSi: Desktop sidebar navigation component that renders grouped nav buttons (Main, Activities, Admin) with icons and tooltips for each tab.
frontend/src/components/reminders/DailyR: Startup modal that fetches today's reminders and displays them in a dialog once per session, shown 1.5 seconds after login if reminders exist.
frontend/src/components/reminders/InAppR: Fixed toast notification component that displays active reminders with a bell icon, plays a chime sound, and supports sound enable/disable toggling.
frontend/src/components/reminders/TechHe: Simple presentational component rendering a circular avatar placeholder with a user icon.
frontend/src/components/results/ResultRo: Modal dialog for editing individual result row cells, rendering labeled inputs for each header field and saving the updated row data on confirmation.
frontend/src/components/search/ExploreHe: Renders an exploration panel with 12 topic cards (space, physics, geography, etc.) and a DuckDuckGo search integration that fetches and displays results including abstracts, answers, definitions, and related topics.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchRes: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/table/DataPrevie: Renders a scrollable, bordered table preview of SheetData with numbered rows, column headers, and empty-cell indicators.
frontend/src/components/table/Horizontal: A simple wrapper component that enables horizontal scrolling for wide tables using overflow-x-auto.
frontend/src/components/team/CallPlaceho: A modal dialog that displays a 'Coming Soon' placeholder for voice or video call features.
frontend/src/components/team/ChannelView: Renders a channel messaging view that fetches and displays channel messages and provides a message input for posting new messages.
frontend/src/components/team/DirectMessa: Renders a direct message conversation view between two principals, fetching messages and allowing the caller to send new ones.
frontend/src/components/team/MessageFeed: Displays a scrollable list of channel or direct messages with avatars, sender names, timestamps, date separators, and support for image and file attachments.
frontend/src/components/team/MessageInpu: A message composition input supporting text entry, file/image attachments (up to 1.5MB via base64), and send-on-Enter behavior.
frontend/src/components/team/ProfileEdit: A dialog for editing the current user's display name and profile picture, loading existing profile data and saving changes via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/team/StatusSelec: A dropdown component for selecting a user's online status (online, away, busy, offline) with color-coded indicators. Uses a mutation hook to update status or calls an optional callback prop.
frontend/src/components/team/TeamSidebar: A sidebar component for a team messaging UI that lists channels and direct message users with avatars, status indicators, and search. Supports collapsible sections for channels, DMs, and online users.
frontend/src/components/updateChecking/U: A search bar component for filtering update-checking results by keyword with configurable match type (contains or exact). Includes a clear button and displays current search context.
frontend/src/components/vlookup/VlookupA: An animated step-by-step visualization of a VLOOKUP operation over spreadsheet data, showing row scanning, match detection, and value return. Supports play/pause/reset controls.
frontend/src/context/ReminderEventsConte: A React context provider that manages the state of an active reminder, exposing methods to set and dismiss it. Consumed via the useReminderEvents hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useApproval.ts: Provides React Query hooks to check if the current caller is approved or an admin, and to list all user approvals for admins.
Provides mutation hooks for requesting user approval and setting approval status for a given principal, with query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating attendance data including config, check-in, and today's check-in with work brief. Invalidates relevant queries on successful mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendanceCalendar: Fetches all attendance entries and transforms them into calendar event objects with formatted titles and descriptions for overlay display.
frontend/src/hooks/useAvatarUrl.ts: Converts a Uint8Array profile picture into a blob URL, managing creation and revocation via useEffect for automatic cleanup.
frontend/src/hooks/useBroadcasts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching active broadcasts, broadcast history, dismissing a broadcast, and creating a new broadcast.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendarEvents.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, creating, and deleting calendar events, with admin-aware query selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on customers, plus a bulk import mutation with duplicate detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useHolidays.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting global holidays via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInAppReminderNotif: Polls active reminders every second and fires a callback when a reminder is due, with periodic cleanup of stale notification records.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useObserveUsers.ts: Admin-only hook that fetches all user approvals and enriches them with user profiles in a single combined query.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductivityMutati: Provides React Query mutation hooks for creating, updating, and deleting reminders, todos, and notes via the backend actor, invalidating relevant query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductivityQuerie: Provides React Query hooks for fetching reminders, todos, and notes from the backend actor, mapping raw backend types to UI-friendly interfaces.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for listing, filtering, and adding history entries, plus a no-op clear history mutation since the backend lacks that method.
frontend/src/hooks/useRegularExpense.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the user's budget and expenses, including input validation and history logging on successful mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useTeamMessaging.ts: Provides React Query hooks for team messaging features including channels, channel messages, direct messages, and user statuses, with polling for real-time updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the caller's and other users' profiles, with cache updates on successful saves.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind CSS styles, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and macOS-inspired utility classes for cards, buttons, and layout components.
frontend/src/lib/attendance/attendancePd: Maps an AttendanceSummary object into a structured ExportData format for PDF generation, including summary stats and daily breakdown rows. Also provides a helper to generate a filename for the exported PDF.
frontend/src/lib/attendance/dateRanges.t: Provides utility functions for computing current week, month, and year date ranges formatted as YYYY-MM-DD strings, plus helpers to format durations and nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/lib/avatarUtils.ts: Converts a Uint8Array profile picture to a blob URL and derives up-to-2-character initials from a display name.
frontend/src/lib/character/tabAnimationM: Defines a mapping from application tab IDs to character animation types and exports helper functions to retrieve the animation for a given tab.
frontend/src/lib/compare/compareWorkbook: Compares two Excel SheetData objects by a key column using three modes: key-presence (new keys), row differences (changed full rows), and column differences (changed columns per key). Returns a ComparisonResult with categorized rows and a summary.
frontend/src/lib/compare/filterCompariso: Filters an array of ComparisonRow objects by a keyword using either exact or contains matching across all cell values.
frontend/src/lib/compare/normalizeRowSig: Generates deterministic string signatures for rows to enable full-row equality checks, and aligns old-sheet rows to a new sheet's header order for consistent comparison.
frontend/src/lib/excel/normalizeHeader.t: Provides utilities to normalize, sanitize, and find Excel header values, including deduplication and placeholder generation for empty headers.
frontend/src/lib/excel/parseWorkbook.ts: Dynamically loads the SheetJS library from CDN and parses an Excel File into a ParsedWorkbook containing sheet names and SheetData maps with sanitized headers.
Builds expense report export data for weekly, monthly, or yearly periods by filtering and sorting ExpenseEntry records, computing totals, and generating a PDF filename.
frontend/src/lib/export/branding.ts: Defines Crystal Atlas branding configuration and provides utility functions to load the logo and watermark as base64 strings or HTMLImageElements for use in exports.
frontend/src/lib/export/exportPdf.ts: Exports tabular data to a professionally branded landscape PDF using dynamically loaded jsPDF, with a logo header, company info footer, and a centered capsule watermark.
frontend/src/lib/export/exportXlsx.ts: Exports tabular data to an Excel file with Crystal Atlas branding using dynamically loaded SheetJS (XLSX), triggering a browser download.
frontend/src/lib/export/pdfCompanyInfo.t: Defines and exports a single source-of-truth constant for company contact and footer information used in PDF exports.
frontend/src/lib/notes/noteEncoding.ts: Provides encode and decode helpers to pack/unpack a note's title and content into a single string using a '|||' separator for backend storage.
frontend/src/lib/results/applyRowEdits.t: Merges in-memory row edits from a Map into a base dataset by matching original row indices, returning the combined rows for export.
frontend/src/lib/results/exportFilters.t: Provides utilities to retrieve available filter columns and unique column values, and to filter rows by a specific column/value pair for export.
frontend/src/lib/results/historyExport.t: Exports HistoryEntry arrays to Excel or PDF by mapping entries to labeled rows and delegating to the shared export utilities.
frontend/src/lib/vlookup/vlookup.ts: Implements VLOOKUP over in-memory SheetData supporting both exact (case-insensitive) and approximate (substring) matching with single or multiple return columns.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUsersTab.tsx: Admin UI tab for managing user approvals and custom date permissions, displaying a table of users with approve/reject and grant/revoke permission actions.
frontend/src/pages/AttendanceTab.tsx: Main attendance page component that handles check-in/check-out, attendance configuration, calendar view, summary ranges, and admin settings using various attendance hooks and sub-components.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarTab.tsx: Calendar events page that displays grouped/sorted events, allows authenticated users to create and delete events, and supports admin-only event visibility.
frontend/src/pages/CustomersTab.tsx: Customers management page providing a searchable table of customer records with add, edit, delete, and CSV import functionality via dialogs and mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/DeskboardTab.tsx: Dashboard landing page displaying a clock/calendar widget, workspace overview cards, and a collapsible DuckDuckGo-powered search/explore panel.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryTab.tsx: History page that lists, filters by type/keyword, groups, and exports (Excel/PDF) user activity history entries such as uploads, searches, and budget changes.
frontend/src/pages/NotesTab.tsx: Notes management page that lets authenticated users create and delete personal notes, displaying them sorted by last-updated date with error handling via a dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/ObserveUsersTab.tsx: Admin-only page that displays a searchable table of all users with their principal IDs, display names, and approval status badges. Includes copy-to-clipboard functionality for principal IDs and access control for non-admin users.
frontend/src/pages/RegularExpenseTab.tsx: Page for managing personal budget settings and expense entries, supporting add/edit/delete operations and PDF report export. Initializes budget form from fetched data and validates all numeric inputs before submission.
frontend/src/pages/RemindersTab.tsx: Page for viewing, creating, and deleting personal reminders with optional repeat-until date support. Renders a dialog form for adding reminders and lists existing ones with delete actions.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsTab.tsx: Displays VLOOKUP, filter, and update-checking results in tables with support for inline row editing, export filters, and export to Excel or PDF. Tracks edited rows in a local map and applies them before export.
frontend/src/pages/SearchTab.tsx: Provides VLOOKUP and column-filter search interfaces against a loaded workbook, storing results in global app state and recording history entries. Supports exact and fuzzy match types and multi-value lookup via comma or newline-separated input.
frontend/src/pages/TeamTab.tsx: Main Team tab page component that renders a team messaging UI with channel/DM sidebar, channel and direct message views, profile editor, status selector, and call modals. Manages selection state for channels and DMs, channel creation, and invite copying.
frontend/src/pages/TodoTab.tsx: Todo list page component that displays open and completed todos fetched from the backend, and provides a dialog for creating new todos with toggle completion support.
frontend/src/pages/UpdateCheckingTab.tsx: Page component for comparing an uploaded Excel workbook against a new file to identify new items, using a key column selector and recording history entries on completion.
frontend/src/pages/UploadTab.tsx: Page component for uploading and previewing Excel workbooks, supporting sheet selection, file replacement, and recording upload history entries.
frontend/src/state/appState.tsx: Global React context providing application state for workbook data, search/filter/comparison results, upload status, and history, with actions to update or reset each piece of state.
frontend/src/utils/assets/resolveAssetUr: Utility function that resolves a relative asset path to a full URL by prepending the app's base path, ensuring correct asset resolution in non-root deployments.
frontend/src/utils/attendance/configMapp: Utility functions for converting between time units, validating attendance configuration form inputs, and constructing an AttendanceConfig backend object from form values.
frontend/src/utils/errors/userFriendlyEr: Converts raw mutation errors (strings, Error objects, or plain objects) into user-friendly messages, preserving backend authorization messages and logging full details to the console.
frontend/src/utils/number/parseNatBigInt: Parses and validates a string into a non-negative integer bigint suitable for ICP Nat backend types, returning a success/failure result or a validation error message.
frontend/src/utils/principal/parsePrinci: Safely parses a Principal from a string or existing Principal instance, returning a typed success/failure result, with a helper to validate Principal values.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for a Microsoft Teams-inspired collaboration app, listing existing features, pending feature requests (messaging, DMs, teams, profiles, invitations), and known issues around profile persistence.
